what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record: it registers an image attachment (att-855cb0ee) in the design-assets channel and points it to a specific image asset URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
target uses an image:// URI pointing to design-assets/logo/Icon_ConceptV_VCircle_Yellow (2)
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with microsecond precision and explicit timezone
The target filename contains spaces and a '(2)' suffix
standouts: Attachment target filename includes '(2)', suggesting a duplicate or downloaded copy
Uses an image:// scheme for the target URI
conventions: Uses a fixed schema of id/channel/attachment_type/target/added
References media via a custom image:// URI
Records addition time as a full ISO 8601 timestamp
concerns: Target URI contains unescaped spaces and parentheses
The '(2)' suffix in the filename hints at an unmanaged duplicate or rename
No uploader, file format, dimensions, or alt-text metadata
No indication whether this asset is current, superseded, or canonical
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that links an id to a design image asset and records when it was added.
questions: What image format and dimensions does the target have?
Does the '(2)' suffix indicate a duplicate or a renamed file?
Is this asset still current or has it been superseded?
How is the attachment id related to the target image path?
intention_signals: To register and make retrievable a specific design image asset within the design-assets channel by assigning it a stable attachment id and timestamp.
novelty: The target URI uses an image:// scheme and includes a filename with a '(2)' suffix and spaces; otherwise it is a routine attachment record.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed reference that maps an attachment id to a concrete design-assets image location, supporting retrieval, audit, and membership queries for channel media.
summary_for_embedding: This is a channel attachment metadata record (att-855cb0ee) in the design-assets channel that references an image asset at image://design-assets/logo/Icon_ConceptV_VCircle_Yellow (2) and records its addition time.
intention_for_embedding: It was intended to catalog and make retrievable a specific design image asset within the design-assets channel.
